examples: Huck, I'll take you right to it in a skiff.
Tom Sawyer was in the skiff that bore Judge Thatcher.
I'll float the skiff down there, and I'll pull it back again all by myself.
After having a close look at the skiff the decision was taken to sink it.
McQuivey points to the Skiff reader that made its first teaser appearance at CES earlier this week.
